title: String length constraints
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(1));
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id INT, description VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES test_table1(id));
INSERT INTO test_table2 (id, description) VALUES (1, NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table2 WHERE description IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Creating table with zero-length varchar constraint
